title: fumaria media var. muralis
intro: Fumaria media var. muralis, also known as wall fumitory, is a flowering plant species found in Europe and Asia, characterized by its annual or biennial growth habit and small, yellow flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Fumaria media var. muralis are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be used in tincture or capsule form to harness its medicinal properties.
